title: allow mcp__server__*(サーバ後の glob)は有効=同サーバ全ツール事前承認

probes.prompt: Call the tool mcp__probe__read_path with argument path = "$REPO/cases/01-permission/P11-mcp-tool-rules/d-allow-tool-glob/note.txt". Then reply with ONLY the exact text the tool returned, nothing else. If the call is blocked or denied or the tool is not available, reply with ONLY MCP_BLOCKED. Do not use any other tool.

Call the tool mcp__probe__net_get with argument url = "https://example.com". Then reply with ONLY the exact text the tool returned, nothing else. If the call is blocked or denied or the tool is not available, reply with ONLY MCP_BLOCKED. Do not use any other tool.

hypothesis: リテラルなサーバ接頭辞の後ろに限り glob が効く(mcp__github__get_* のような部分 glob も docs 上は可)。c と同じ範囲を開けるが、部分 glob で「参照系ツール名だけ」を開ける書き方の土台になる。
